evals.prompt:
Generate a channel performance report with this data:

Google Ads: £30,891 cost (prev: £44,142), 54 conversions (prev: 104), CPA £572 (prev: £424), ROAS 2.40x (prev: 3.54x)
Meta Ads: £16,567 cost (prev: £17,952), 17 conversions (prev: 25), CPA £975 (prev: £718), ROAS 2.03x (prev: 3.26x)
Total: £47,458 cost (prev: £62,093), 71 conversions (prev: 129), CPA £668 (prev: £481), ROAS 2.27x (prev: 3.46x)

Period: Feb 2026 vs Jan 2026. Client: Acme Corp. Attribution: First Click 90D.
evals.expected_output: Dark-themed report with KPI summary cards, comparison table with stacked-cell layout showing current/previous values and delta badges, SegmentStream branding
expectations: FUNCTIONAL: Output is a valid single-file report — HTML (self-contained) or JSX (with 'export default function')
FUNCTIONAL[JSX]: Contains NO arbitrary Tailwind values (no square brackets like bg-[#xxx], grid-cols-[...], text-[#xxx])
FUNCTIONAL: Does not use localStorage, sessionStorage, or fetch()
FUNCTIONAL: SegmentStream logo SVG present with at least 10 <path> elements (not truncated)
Uses dark theme — black/near-black background for the page
Contains comparison/period-over-period data — both current AND previous values visible in the table
Delta badges/tags use correct color semantics: cost decrease is positive (green/emerald), CPA increase is negative (red)
Contains KPI cards showing key totals (spend, conversions, CPA, ROAS)
All numeric values use monospace font (font-mono class or monospace font-family)
Has 'Generated via SegmentStream MCP' text in footer
Report title appears as a prominent heading inside the content area, not in the top bar

evals.prompt:
Generate a minimal summary report with just these KPIs:

Total Spend: £47,458
Total Conversions: 71
Blended CPA: £668
Blended ROAS: 2.27x

Period: February 2026. Client: Acme Corp. Keep it simple — just the headline numbers, no tables or charts needed.
evals.expected_output: Minimal dark-themed report with 4 KPI cards, no unnecessary components
expectations: FUNCTIONAL: Output is a valid single-file report — HTML (self-contained) or JSX (with 'export default function')
FUNCTIONAL[JSX]: Contains NO arbitrary Tailwind values (no square brackets)
FUNCTIONAL: SegmentStream logo SVG present with at least 10 <path> elements
Contains exactly 4 KPI cards showing Spend, Conversions, CPA, and ROAS
KPI labels are concise and won't wrap to multiple lines
Does not contain a data table (user asked for minimal — just headline numbers)
Has 'Generated via SegmentStream MCP' footer
Dark theme applied

evals.prompt:
Generate a campaign breakdown report with this data:

Google Ads campaigns:
- Brand Exact: £6,200 spend, 82 conversions, CPA £76, ROAS 5.2x
- Shopping Smart: £5,400 spend, 68 conversions, CPA £79, ROAS 4.8x
- Generic Broad: £3,600 spend, 28 conversions, CPA £129, ROAS 2.1x

Meta Ads campaigns:
- Retargeting DPA: £4,800 spend, 52 conversions, CPA £92, ROAS 4.1x
- Prospecting LAL: £3,200 spend, 38 conversions, CPA £84, ROAS 3.4x

Period: February 2026. Client: Acme Corp. Group campaigns by channel.
evals.expected_output: Campaign-level data table with row group headers separating Google Ads and Meta Ads sections, channel icons
expectations: FUNCTIONAL: Output is a valid single-file report — HTML (self-contained) or JSX (with 'export default function')
FUNCTIONAL[JSX]: Contains NO arbitrary Tailwind values (no square brackets)
FUNCTIONAL: SegmentStream logo SVG present with at least 10 <path> elements
Contains a table with all 5 campaign rows and their metrics
Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns are visually grouped (row group headers or distinct sections)
Channel SVG icons appear next to platform names
Numeric columns are right-aligned with monospace font
Dark theme and 'Generated via SegmentStream MCP' footer present

evals.prompt:
Generate an interactive channel report using expandable rows. Data:

Google Ads (total: £18,420 cost, 198 conv, CPA £93, ROAS 4.6x):
- Brand Exact: £6,200, 82 conv, CPA £76, ROAS 5.2x
- Shopping Smart: £5,400, 68 conv, CPA £79, ROAS 4.8x
- Generic Broad: £3,600, 28 conv, CPA £129, ROAS 2.1x

Meta Ads (total: £12,640 cost, 128 conv, CPA £99, ROAS 3.9x):
- Retargeting DPA: £4,800, 52 conv, CPA £92, ROAS 4.1x
- Prospecting LAL: £3,200, 38 conv, CPA £84, ROAS 3.4x

Period: February 2026. Make channel rows expandable to show their campaigns.
evals.expected_output: Drill-down table with expandable channel rows — using <details>/<summary> (HTML) or useState + <table> (JSX)
expectations: FUNCTIONAL: Output is a valid single-file report — HTML (self-contained) or JSX (with 'export default function')
FUNCTIONAL[JSX]: Contains NO arbitrary Tailwind values (no square brackets like grid-cols-[...])
FUNCTIONAL[JSX]: Uses <table> elements for drill-down, NOT CSS grid with arbitrary column widths
FUNCTIONAL[HTML]: Uses <details>/<summary> for expand/collapse
FUNCTIONAL: SegmentStream logo SVG present with at least 10 <path> elements
Expand/collapse mechanism present — chevron/arrow icons indicate state
Parent rows show channel totals with channel icons
Child campaign rows are visually indented under their parent channel
At least one channel is expanded by default
Dark theme and 'Generated via SegmentStream MCP' footer present

evals.prompt:
Generate a performance summary with insights. Data:

Overall: spend down 24%, conversions down 45%, CPA up 39%, ROAS down 34%.

Key insight: Both channels show a disproportionate conversion drop relative to spend reduction, indicating worsening unit economics.

Google Ads: CPA increased from £424 to £572 despite lower spend.
Meta Ads: ROAS dropped from 3.26x to 2.03x.

Period: Feb vs Jan 2026. Client: Acme Corp. Include an executive summary and warning callouts for problem areas.
evals.expected_output: Report with executive summary block, warning/negative callouts highlighting problem areas
expectations: FUNCTIONAL: Output is a valid single-file report — HTML (self-contained) or JSX (with 'export default function')
FUNCTIONAL[JSX]: Contains NO arbitrary Tailwind values (no square brackets)
FUNCTIONAL: SegmentStream logo SVG present with at least 10 <path> elements
Contains an executive summary section with narrative text explaining the overall trend
Contains at least one warning/negative callout box highlighting problem areas
Callout boxes have visual emphasis — colored left border or distinct background
Inline numbers (currencies, percentages, ROAS) visually distinct from prose (monospace + accent color or .num class)
Entity names (channels, campaigns) in bold/strong to stand out from descriptive text
Dark theme and 'Generated via SegmentStream MCP' footer present
